_comment: Relaxed policy for greenfield or experimental projects. Not recommended for production.
_comment_cooldown_hours: Set to 0 to disable the publication cooldown. Packages are admitted immediately after publishing. Increase this to 72 or more for production.

pinning._comment: Pinning is disabled. package.json may use ^ or ~ ranges. Enable for production to prevent silent upgrades.

scripts._comment: Empty allowlist with no install-script blocking policy. trustlock does not block install scripts unless the allowlist policy is activated via the scripts rule. This relaxed config leaves the default behavior in place.

sources._comment: Allows packages installed from the npm registry, git URLs, and local file paths. Remove 'git' and 'file' in production to restrict to registry-only sources.

provenance._comment: Provenance attestation is not required for any package. Set to ['*'] in production to require SLSA provenance for all packages.

transitive._comment: High threshold for transitive dependency surprise. Greenfield projects often pull in large dependency trees. Lower to 3-5 in production to surface unexpected bloat.

_comment_require_reason: Approval reasons are not required. This makes approvals faster in development but reduces auditability. Set to true in production.
_comment_max_expiry_days: Approvals may last up to 90 days. Use 14-30 days in production to ensure regular review of policy overrides.
